title: E-Reader (OPDS)
description: Connect your e-reader or reading app to download ebooks — and read comics with OPDS-PSE page streaming — directly from your library using OPDS.

feedUrl.title: Ebook Feed URL
feedUrl.description: Add this URL to your e-reader or reading app to access your ebook library.

comicsFeedUrl.title: Comics Feed URL (OPDS-PSE)
comicsFeedUrl.description: Add this URL to a comic reader like Panels to stream and read your comics, with reading position synced across devices.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: OPDS requires authentication to access your library. You'll need an API key to connect.
auth.step1: Go to Preferences and generate an API key if you haven't already.
auth.step2: When your e-reader asks for credentials, enter any username (e.g., your email).
auth.step3: Use your API key as the password.

setup.title: Setup Instructions
setup.description: Follow these instructions to connect your e-reader or reading app.

kindle.title: Kindle (via KOReader)
kindle.step1: Install KOReader on your Kindle (requires jailbreak).
kindle.step2: Open KOReader and go to Search → OPDS catalog.
kindle.step3: Add a new catalog with the OPDS URL above.
kindle.step4: Enter any username and your API key as the password when prompted.

kobo.title: Kobo (via KOReader)
kobo.step1: Install KOReader on your Kobo device.
kobo.step2: Open KOReader and go to Search → OPDS catalog.
kobo.step3: Add a new catalog with the OPDS URL above.
kobo.step4: Enter any username and your API key as the password when prompted.

ios.title: iOS (iPhone/iPad)
ios.step1: Download an OPDS-compatible app like Panels, Marvin, or Yomu.
ios.step2: In the app, look for an option to add an OPDS catalog or library.
ios.step4: Enter any username and your API key as the password when prompted.

panels.title: Comics on iOS (Panels)
panels.step1: Install Panels from the App Store.
panels.step2: Open Panels and go to Library → Connect Service → OPDS.
panels.step3: Enter the Comics Feed URL above.
panels.step4: Enter any username and your API key as the password. Panels will stream pages and remember where you left off.

android.title: Android
android.step1: Download an OPDS-compatible app like Moon+ Reader, FBReader, or Librera.
android.step2: In the app, find the option to add an OPDS/network library.
android.step4: Enter any username and your API key as the password when prompted.

learnMore.title: What is OPDS?
learnMore.description: OPDS (Open Publication Distribution System) is an open standard for distributing digital publications. It allows e-reader apps to browse, search, and download ebooks directly from compatible servers like Bookmark.
